doc: A saw synth whose MASTER filter cutoff is a base value PLUS an LFO wobble — base-plus-modulation built explicitly with a Signal `add` operator (ADR-0017/0032). Play with /voicer/notes [midi, gate]. The 8 voices are hosted `auto-filter-voice` sub-patches (saw -> ADSR VCA); the voicer sums them and one shared resonant filter sweeps the mix. Move the base cutoff with /cutoff/in [20..12000]; change the wobble with /lfo/rate (Hz) and /lfo/depth (Hz of sweep). The LFO swings around 0 and `add` sums it onto the base CV, which feeds the master filter's Signal cutoff input.

nodes.doc: Hosts 8 auto-filter-voice sub-patches; allocates notes across them and sums their audio.
Master filter on the summed mix; cutoff driven by base + LFO; resonant so the sweep sings.
Wobble around 0 (center 0), added onto the base cutoff.
Base cutoff as a smoothed CV; default 2000 Hz. Send /cutoff/in [Hz].
